title: Ask/hire an expert - CRM set up
excerpt: HI we are a small consultancy looking for 1-2 hours support from a monday.com crm expert to support / fine tune our new crm set up in uk

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @samantha.DC.UK

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official USA Channel and Advanced Services Delivery monday partner with over 6 years of experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals, and we are greatly experienced with designing CRMs!

I want to be clear with you, I am not sure just 1 or 2 hours are enough to do what you are asking, but let’s discuss!

Please do set up a meeting with us right here.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @samantha.DC.UK

Welcome to the community! Adopting monday.com CRM is an effective way to improve your workflow. The CRM support offered by dedicated monday.com experts ensures that your system is updated regularly with the latest features and enhancements, providing your team with constant access to cutting-edge tools. They also find vulnerabilities and fix them before they impact your business operations.

If you’re looking to hire skilled CRM experts, teaming up with a monday.com consulting company is the ideal choice. By being proactive, their dedicated experts can reduce downtime and ensure a reliable CRM system that your enterprise can rely on.

posts.author: AnastasiaOstrov (AnastasiaOstrov)
posts.cookedHtml: Setting up a CRM system can be challenging, with common issues including data migration difficulties, user adoption resistance, and integration with existing tools. Addressing these challenges early ensures a smoother implementation and better efficiency. Learn more about the issues in implementing crm in this detailed article.
